Comments: Incidence of hypertension (systolic blood pressure above 140 mmHg, diastolic blood pressure above 90 mmHg or antihypertensive treatment)

Validity: Free of Fatty Liver Disease at baseline. This score is not applicable to patients with heavy alcohol use (>7 drinks per week for women or > 14 drinks per week for men), weight ≥ 160 kg, or age ≤ 40 years for women or age ≤ 35 for men. Triglycerides were measured fasting.
Comments:
Incident fatty liver (on computed tomography scan)
A risk factor - or preceding diagnosis of cirrhosis and possibly liver cancer
